recommendedChanges: Squad-rating review (not a formula change): CRO (9 matchups), NED (8 matchups), POR (5 matchups), MEX (4 matchups) consistently underperform their FIFA rank in this model. Worth a Codex review of these teams' player attributes/qualitative_adjustments rather than a global ModelConfig change.
